Most Reliable way to make your money grow

Estate Protocol enables people from everywhere to invest in the world's most desirable real estate and earn a stable income.

Choose from Expert Curated International Properties

after proper due diligence and based on historical data.

Invest in Properties from Stable Economies

from anywhere in the world using your stablecoin.

Collect Rent & get Annual Appreciation

Start investing and build your portfolio with as little as 100 USDC.

How does it work?

Compare Real Estate, REITS & Tokenized Real Estate Investments

Traditional Real EstateREITsTokenized Real Estate
DownpaymentSubstantial Down Payment Required.Not required.Not required.
Minimum InvestmentVery highHigh, depending on countryAs low as 100 USDC*.
Freedom of choice Can choose your property No freedom to choose property Can choose your property
Investment OpportunityLow Accessibility only in local MarketsLow accessibility to few Global MarketsDirect Accessibility in Global Markets, 24/7
Income SourceRental income from property ownership.Income from dividends, typically generated from rental income.Rental income, and additional income through tokens and blockchain-based incentives.
Property managementSelf managementManaged with no transparency100% transparent rent distribution and management
Estimated Income2-5% in most markets2-4% in most marketsApprox. 8-10%
DiversificationLimited diversification, need to buy whole propertiesPortfolio of properties, but in same locationDiversification across a wide range of properties and locations, enhancing risk mitigation.
ProcessExtensive paperwork, including legal contracts, deeds, and property titles.Some paperworkDigitized process. No paperwork.

Entrepreneur, Real Estate Investor

Start Your Journey into the Future of Real Estate Investing Today with Tokenized Properties for Everyone.

View Properties

Got A Query?
We're Here To answer!

Estate Protocol tokenizes real estate and bridges the gap between real world assets and the digital world through blockchain. Through Estate Protocol, people from anywhere in the world can invest in fractionalized properties in stable economies.

Estate Protocol works by turning the ownership of international real estate digital, and fractionalizing the ownership interest to make it accessible to everyone.

Sign up to the platform, verify your identity, and get started with investing in international real estate!

Browse the list of available properties, go through the provided documentation, and use it to make your decision.

You will be able to list your property-backed tokens for sale on decentralized exchanges right away, and we’re working on other mechanisms for easy sales, but keep in mind the tokens may not be liquid right away.

Anyone can start investing in International real estate except for residents of certain sanctioned countries. There might be some restrictions for users from the US and UK because of regulatory reasons.

We enable people to own a piece of prime real estate in economically stable countries by tokenizing real world assets with the power of blockchain technology.
